headline: Assessing Invesco (IVZ) Valuation As Recent Share Momentum Cools
summary: Context for Invesco’s Recent Share Performance Invesco (IVZ) has seen mixed share performance recently, with a small 1 day gain, modest pressure over the past week, and declines over the past month and past 3 months shaping short term sentiment. See our latest analysis for Invesco. While the 1 day share price return was slightly positive, the 30 day and year to date share price returns of 6.93% and 9.73% declines contrast with a 61.35% 1 year total shareholder return. This suggests that...
